resume.title: Resume
resume.description: A resume submitted for AI formatting and status tracking.

content.description: A JSON object containing resume data like parsed content, original fileName, and reject flags.

user_id.description: Reference UID for the user who uploaded the resume.

created_at.description: ISO time when document was uploaded or created.

activityLog.title: ActivityLog
activityLog.description: Tracks administrative and user activities over submissions.

action.description: Type of action performed, e.g. resume_submitted, resume_approved, etc.

details.description: Extra details related specifically to this action.

user_id.description: UID of the user associated with this activity log if any.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp for when this activity happened.

/resumes/{resumeId}.description: Submissions collection for formatting results and workflow pipeline.

/activity_logs/{logId}.description: Audit trails for actions executed by users or background tasks.
